SEARCH
Package com.langfuse.client.resources.llmconnections.types

Class LlmConnection.Builder

java.lang.Object
com.langfuse.client.resources.llmconnections.types.LlmConnection.Builder
All Implemented Interfaces:
LlmConnection._FinalStage, LlmConnection.AdapterStage, LlmConnection.CreatedAtStage, LlmConnection.DisplaySecretKeyStage, LlmConnection.IdStage, LlmConnection.ProviderStage, LlmConnection.UpdatedAtStage, LlmConnection.WithDefaultModelsStage
Enclosing class:
LlmConnection
public static final class LlmConnection.Builder extends Object implements LlmConnection.IdStage, LlmConnection.ProviderStage, LlmConnection.AdapterStage, LlmConnection.DisplaySecretKeyStage, LlmConnection.WithDefaultModelsStage, LlmConnection.CreatedAtStage, LlmConnection.UpdatedAtStage, LlmConnection._FinalStage

    • config

      public LlmConnection._FinalStage config(Map<String,Object> config)

      Adapter-specific configuration. Required for Bedrock ({"region":"us-east-1"}), optional for VertexAI ({"location":"us-central1"}), not used by other adapters.

      Specified by:
      config in interface LlmConnection._FinalStage
      Returns:
      Reference to this so that method calls can be chained together.
